title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Malls - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Malls - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
